scenarios.capability: Design a correct hierarchical directory structure from a flat monolithic plan
scenarios.reason: The agent can produce a directory tree design from a described flat plan without executing shell commands.

scenarios.capability: Apply flatten vs subdivide heuristics to groups at the boundary of the 3-7 rule
scenarios.reason: The agent can evaluate group sizes and apply the decision table to produce a recommendation document.

scenarios.capability: Identify anti-patterns in a proposed directory restructure
scenarios.reason: The agent can review a proposed structure and flag violations of naming conventions, over-nesting, and premature deletion.

scenarios.capability: Write correct README content for phase and activity directories
scenarios.reason: The agent can produce properly structured README files for non-leaf directories based on the template requirements.

scenarios.capability: Redirect a splitter request to implementation-planner Mode 2 with correct guidance
scenarios.reason: The agent can recognize the redirect from the stub SKILL.md and provide the correct mode and commands from implementation-planner.
